name: commit-writer
description: Automatically generates conventional commit messages from staged changes
author: Kimi Plugin Community

interface.shortDescription: Automatically generates conventional commit messages from staged changes
interface.longDescription:
Commit Writer generates clear, conventional commit messages based on your staged git changes.

It analyses the diff, identifies the type of change (feat, fix, refactor, docs, etc.), and produces a properly formatted commit message that follows the Conventional Commits specification.

Usage:
1. Stage your changes with `git add`
2. Run `/commit-writer:write` in Kimi Code
3. Review and apply the suggested commit message

Alternatively, just tell Kimi "write a commit message for my staged changes".
